title: Happy 50th Birthday Banner, 50th Birthday Decorations Banner for Women Men Pink Glitter Party Decor Sign Funny Supplies Holy You're 50 Party Decoration
features: 【You only turn 50 once】Funny 50th birthday banner is perfect for women or men's birthday celebration! Celebrate the special birthday with a banner featuring the milestone age. A great addition on 50th birthday party!

【Unforgettable Birthday Decorations】This shining letter banner is no shedding “HOLY *** YOU'RE 50”glitter paper. Add excitement to her party with our 50th banner that will certainly make her/him 50th birthday unforgettable!

【High Quality Material】Unlike other flimsy banners made with glitter that falls off after the slightest touch the banner is made of light & sturdy cardboard with a length of 16cm/6.3inch per letter and premium glitter that gives a unique shine and doesn’t easily rub off.
【Effortless Assembly】Please note that these banners require SELF ASSEMBLY. Honestly, it's super easy! All you need to do is to pull the hanging rope through the 2 holes of every single flag.

【So Many Uses】Use it for a 50th birthday, anniversary, or retirement party! This banner is sturdy but not heavy and meant to be reused. there is no way your guests are going to miss this! Give everyone a laugh!
description: Features: --Congratulations on surviving half a century! What better way to celebrate than with our hand strung, premium quality "50 & Fabulous" banner. This banner is the perfect decoration to add a touch of classy decor and welcome your guests to the occasion. --The beautiful, Pink glitter accents matches the high quality lettering and will definitely catch the attention of your loved ones. Our happy anniversary sign is meant to be reused...so put it in the drawer until someone else hits 50! Specificiations: Material: paper Size: paper card length 16cm/6.3inch, rope length 5m/16.4ft Net weight: 42g Gross weight: 42g Packing method: bag Package size: 20*11*1.3cm Packing list: 1 * 50th Birthday Banner 16 * Glitter paper 1 roll of tape 1 plastic threading needle

specifications_table.Included Components: Glitter paper, Tape, Plastic threading needle
